title: task
description: ip_coap.py:199 - When close_task completes first, next_task is cancelled but never awaited before returning None. This leaves a dangling task and Python emits 'Task was destroyed but it is pending!' warning. The fix should await next_task after cancelling: 'with suppress(asyncio.CancelledError): await next_task'. Compare to packet_coap.py which correctly awaits cancelled tasks.
close_reason: Already fixed: duplicate of 57os, code at lines 199-201 already awaits next_task after cancel
